'''wapate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:logographically|logographically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-p-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:logographically|logographically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wapate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:wapate|wapate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wapatesher|wapatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wapatesherĂ«m|wapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wapatero|wapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wapateshĂ«|wapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wapateshĂ«m|wapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwapatero|gokiwapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwapateshĂ«|gokiwapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwapateshĂ«m|gokiwapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowapankerom|gowapankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowapankeshĂ«|gowapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowapankeshĂ«m|gowapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowapankeya|gowapankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wapaterom|wapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wapatemu|wapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wapateya|wapateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwapaterom|gokiwapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwapatemu|gokiwapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwapateya|gokiwapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:wapapate|wapapate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wapapatesher|wapapatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wapapatesherĂ«m|wapapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wapapatero|wapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wapapateshĂ«|wapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wapapateshĂ«m|wapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwapapatero|gokiwapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwapapateshĂ«|gokiwapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwapapateshĂ«m|gokiwapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowapapankerom|gowapapankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowapapankeshĂ«|gowapapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowapapankeshĂ«m|gowapapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowapapankeya|gowapapankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wapapaterom|wapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wapapatemu|wapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wapapateya|wapapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwapapaterom|gokiwapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwapapatemu|gokiwapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwapapateya|gokiwapapateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:wĂŠpĂŠte|wĂŠpĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wĂŠpĂŠtesher|wĂŠpĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m|wĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠpĂŠtero|wĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|wĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|wĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠpĂŠtero|gokiwĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|gokiwĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiwĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowĂŠpĂŠnkerom|gowĂŠpĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«|gowĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gowĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowĂŠpĂŠnkeya|gowĂŠpĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠpĂŠterom|wĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠpĂŠtemu|wĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wĂŠpĂŠteya|wĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠpĂŠterom|gokiwĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠpĂŠtemu|gokiwĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠpĂŠteya|gokiwĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:wafpafte|wafpafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wafpaftesher|wafpaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafpaftesherĂ«m|wafpaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafpaftero|wafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wafpafteshĂ«|wafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafpafteshĂ«m|wafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafpaftero|gokiwafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwafpafteshĂ«|gokiwafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafpafteshĂ«m|gokiwafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowafpafnkerom|gowafpafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowafpafnkeshĂ«|gowafpafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowafpafnkeshĂ«m|gowafpafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowafpafnkeya|gowafpafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafpafterom|wafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafpaftemu|wafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wafpafteya|wafpafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafpafterom|gokiwafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafpaftemu|gokiwafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwafpafteya|gokiwafpafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
